semantic.judge: a migration and a rollback ARE declared, so the scanner reports mentions:true; the griller's ADVISORY safety judgment (the bulk of the axis) recognizes the migration is UNSAFE — it drops a populated email column with no backfill/archival (permanent data loss) and the declared rollback re-adds an EMPTY column that does not restore the dropped data, so it is irreversible dressed as reversible. It emits exactly one advisory finding (rule_id P7) on the offending forward-migration line (the DROP COLUMN email line), never gating; the presence of a declaration did not auto-suppress the concern.
